evals.prompt: Name the CSS classes for a new card component with a header element and a featured variant.
evals.expected_output: Uses c- prefix, BEM structure, and dash-case throughout.
expectations: Block class uses c- prefix: e.g. c-card
Element class uses BEM double underscore: e.g. c-card__header
Modifier class uses BEM double dash: e.g. c-card--featured

evals.prompt: Name a JavaScript variable for the current user's display name and a JavaScript class for a form validator.
evals.expected_output: Variable uses camelCase, class uses PascalCase.
expectations: Variable name is camelCase (e.g. displayName or currentUserDisplayName)

evals.prompt: Add a size modifier to a heading component that applies only from the md breakpoint and up.
evals.expected_output: Uses the 2xl size abbreviation and @from-md responsive suffix.
expectations: Uses abbreviated size from the scale: 2xs, xs, sm, md, lg, xl, 2xl
Uses @from-md suffix (not min-md, from-medium, or other patterns)
Does not use spelled-out sizes like 'large', 'xxlarge', or 'xlarge'

evals.prompt: Name a CSS custom property for the primary background color scoped to a card component in the mmn project.
evals.expected_output: Uses --c-mmn-card-bg-primary following the scoped naming pattern.
expectations: Includes the c- prefix for component scope
Uses bg- for background color (not brand-, surface-, or color-)
